creator: vince@vincentbentley.co.uk
text:
pkg-static: krb5-1.17_1 conflicts with heimdal-7.5.0_3 (installs files into the same place).  Problematic file: /usr/local/bin/kadmin

This package does not provide a choice of Kerberos implementation which causes problems on systems that require Heimdal Kerberos. 

There are no configuration options to set to choose between Base, Heimdal or MIT which is often provided in other FreeBSD packages that have a Kerberos dependency.
